inputs.label: Number of Recordable Cases
inputs.businessContext: OSHA recordable work-related injuries and illnesses in the period.

businessContext_i18n.en: OSHA recordable work-related injuries and illnesses in the period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönemdeki OSHA kayıtlı işle ilgili yaralanma ve hastalıklar.
businessContext_i18n.de: OSHA-meldepflichtige arbeitsbedingte Verletzungen und Erkrankungen im Zeitraum.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Blessures et maladies professionnelles enregistrables selon l'OSHA au cours de la période.
businessContext_i18n.es: Lesiones y enfermedades laborales registrables según OSHA en el período.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إصابات وأمراض العمل القابلة للتسجيل وفقًا لـ OSHA خلال الفترة.

inputs.label: Number of Employees
inputs.businessContext: Full-time equivalent employees during the period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Full-time equivalent employees during the period.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Employés équivalents temps plein au cours de la période.
businessContext_i18n.es: Empleados equivalentes a tiempo completo durante el período.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الموظفون المكافئون بدوام كامل خلال الفترة.

inputs.label: Hours Worked per Week
inputs.businessContext: Standard work hours per employee per week.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard work hours per employee per week.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çalışan başına haftalık standart çalışma saati.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Heures de travail standard par employé par semaine.
businessContext_i18n.es: Horas de trabajo estándar por empleado por semana.
businessContext_i18n.ar: ساعات العمل القياسية لكل موظف في الأسبوع.

inputs.label: Weeks Worked per Year
inputs.businessContext: Weeks per year the employees actually work (excluding holidays, vacations).

businessContext_i18n.en: Weeks per year the employees actually work (excluding holidays, vacations).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çalışanların fiilen çalıştığı yıllık hafta sayısı (tatiller, izinler hariç).
businessContext_i18n.de: Wochen pro Jahr, die die Mitarbeiter tatsächlich arbeiten (ohne Feiertage, Urlaub).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Semaines par an où les employés travaillent réellement (hors jours fériés, vacances).
businessContext_i18n.es: Semanas por año que los empleados realmente trabajan (excluyendo festivos, vacaciones).
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد الأسابيع التي يعملها الموظفون فعليًا في السنة (باستثناء العطلات والإجازات).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
